_comment: Active research state for Auto Audio Depth Estimation. One study = one structural hypothesis and its HPO/confirmation progression. When a study concludes, append a PASS/FAIL row to hypotheses.tsv, update archive.json, then open the next study. Adaptive-HPO ladder: structural-screen -> 3 -> 5 -> 7 -> 10, each extension justified by evidence. Never crown on <2-3 confirming draws (S10/E125 lesson).
global_champion_note: NEW CHAMPION (S19): 10ch multi-resolution STFT (n_fft 512+128) + TTA, 3-draw mean 2.0639. Old TTA 5ch (494b5e2, 2.082) demoted to lineage champion. To revert to a 5ch experiment: set prepare.FEATURE_FN=None + in_ch=5.

concluded_studies.note: 5th TTA draw E135=2.0796; 5-draw mean 2.0821 +-0.0075. Champion robustly settled. Holding action; operator then approved PROPOSAL-01.

Early/late waveform-split 10ch (E136=2.1247) is +0.043 worse: splitting the waveform truncates each STFT and the baseline STFT time-axis already carries echo timing. Temporal axis not the bottleneck. PROPOSAL-01 seam works.

Multi-resolution STFT (n_fft 512+128) 10ch. 3 draws E137/E138/E139 mean 2.0639 +-0.004, all below old champion best draw 2.072. Fine-time echo-delay resolution adds real depth signal (ABS_REL+d1 up, RMSE tied). First gain beyond the architecture ceiling. Commit 828b9a3.
L/R-equivariance training is redundant with the free eval-time TTA and costs an anneal epoch (E131 budget-bust; E132 comp 2.0925 > champion 2.079). See hypotheses.tsv.
4th TTA draw E133=2.0935; 4-draw mean 2.0827 +-0.008, ~2 sigma below old baseline 2.099. Champion settled.

Confidence-weighted TTA (E134=2.0966) is worse than uniform 50/50 (2.083); uniform is near-optimal for two symmetric views, learned per-pixel confidence is noisy on held-out scenes. TTA blend already optimal.

strategic_note: IN-SCOPE FRONTIER EXHAUSTED. Four consecutive exploratory studies have now FAILed (S10 geometry-cross-attn, S13 bins, S14 equivariance, S16 conf-TTA) and the champion (TTA, comp ~2.083) is settled over 4 draws. All train.py-editable axes are mapped: geometry (all scales), capacity/width/depth, resolution/decode, loss terms, register tokens, decode-paradigm, equivariance, inference ensembling. The ONE genuinely-unexplored, physically-motivated, high-value axis is the acoustic REPRESENTATION (PROPOSAL-01), which is GATED behind a deliberate refactor of the currently-read-only prepare.py (multi-resolution STFT / early-late echo split / cross-channel coherence, keeping split+target+metric byte-identical). This requires an explicit operator go/no-go before touching prepare.py. Surfaced to operator; awaiting decision. Meanwhile keeping the loop alive with a low-risk consolidation (S17).

active_study.general_hypothesis: The multi-res STFT win (S19) comes from the fine-time-resolution block that sharpens echo-delay/distance cues; the resolution of that block is the crux hyperparameter, so tuning the fine-block n_fft (time-vs-frequency tradeoff) should map how far this lever goes.
active_study.detailed_hypothesis: Sweep the fine block's n_fft: 64 (even finer time, coarser freq) and 256 (less-fine time, more freq), vs the champion's 128, to find the resolution that best localises echo delays without destroying the ILD/IPD spatial cues.
active_study.experiment_note: E140: fine block n_fft=64 (multires_feat -> _feat5_at(wav, 64, 20, 64)). Later E141: n_fft=256. Each judged vs champion 3-draw mean 2.064.

runs.verdict: tied 128 (within noise); fine-block value is TIME res

open_risks: n_fft=64 gives only ~33 freq bins -> ILD/IPD may lose the spectral detail that encodes direction; could hurt. If so, 128 stays optimal.
Tune gains will be small vs the S19 structural win (2.064); require >noise (>~0.006) AND a confirming draw before re-crowning within the lineage. Do not crown a tune on 1 draw.
active_study.decision_rule: HPO ladder 3->5->7. Judge each vs champion 3-draw mean 2.064. If a resolution clearly beats 2.064 (and replicates) -> new lineage champion, continue HPO. If 64 and 256 are both >= 128 -> 128 is the tuned optimum, conclude S20, then EXPLORE the next representation idea (3rd resolution block / cross-channel coherence / per-band echo processing). Champion stays multi-res-128 (828b9a3) unless beaten+confirmed.

backlog.idea: PROPOSAL-01: the input STFT + spatial-cue construction is fixed inside prepare.py, so the audio representation (the one genuinely unexplored, physically-motivated axis: multi-resolution STFT, early/late echo split, cross-channel coherence) cannot be searched from train.py. This is the most promising path to a NEW real gain but requires the gated prepare.py refactor in program.md PROPOSAL-01 (keep split/target/metric fixed; verify baseline byte-equivalence). Flag for the operator.

Confidence-weighted TTA: a lightweight per-pixel confidence head to blend the two L/R views non-uniformly instead of 50/50. Extends the winning TTA lineage. Symmetry argues uniform is near-optimal, so screen cheaply.
Only if a NEW complementary mechanism appears; geometry axis is saturated at all cheap scales.
